Package com.example.androidexample

Class DTOmodels.review

java.lang.Object
com.example.androidexample.DTOmodels.review
Enclosing class:
DTOmodels
public static class DTOmodels.review extends Object
Represents a user review for a specific piece of media, detailing the rating score and text body submitted by the user.

    • id

  • Constructor Details

    • review

      public review()
      Default constructor required for Gson deserialization.

    • review

      public review(String mediaType, String title, int rating, String body)
      Constructs a new review object.
      Parameters:
      mediaType - The category of the media being reviewed (e.g., "MUSIC").
      title - The unique title or identifier for the review.
      rating - The numerical score given by the user.
      body - The textual content of the user's review.
